description: A stadium manager needs to schedule the annual inspection and maintenance for the stadium's HVAC system.

nodes.task_description: Review the stadium's event schedule to find a suitable maintenance window during the off-season.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a two-week period with no scheduled events.

nodes.task_description: Contact the approved HVAC vendor to schedule the maintenance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the service with the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order in the facility management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the scheduled maintenance in the system.
